pi_items.source: Verified via verifier.py which strictly extracts and evaluates the GPX file from this exact path.
Verified via verifier.py which explicitly checks for the Garmin GPX extension <gpxx:DisplayColor>Red</gpxx:DisplayColor>.
Verified via verifier.py which requires the phrase 'invasive species' to be present in the exported GPX content.
Verified by inspecting data/fells_loop.gpx which matches the official TopoGrafix sample for Middlesex Fells Reservation (bounds: lat 42.44, lon -71.10).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real GPX data (fells_loop.gpx) corresponding to the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts. The exported track must be saved to C:\workspace\output\annotated_track.gpx, contain the phrase 'invasive species' in its description, and have its display color changed to Red (indicated by <gpxx:DisplayColor>Red</gpxx:DisplayColor> in the GPX extensions).
